_meta.name: canonical
_meta.description: The default Sundog Workbench pose. Single primary sun, 22° halo, two outward parhelia daggers riding the gentle parhelic-arc grin, CZA eyelid above, sun pillar through the centre. Calibration anchor for SUNDOG_OVERLAY_PROTOCOL.md against troels-nielsen-dr.jpg.

calibration.czaBloom: demoted 2026-05-08 — no longer a parameter; baked at filter stdDeviation=0.3 in the renderer. The eyelid bell shape is produced by the cza-bell-fill paint region between the two arcs, not by Gaussian summation.
